item.title: Version 0.5.14
item.description:
• drop full-Session @Query from ActiveSessionObserver
  • launch params for opening an existing conversation/session
  • rebuild conversation index by walking conversations, not all sessions
  • stop auto-scroll from fighting the user during streaming
  • show all enabled agents/groups in sidebar; recover projects from recents
  • pauseSession resolves pending autonomous-result waiters
  • flush token count on first stream token
  • bug fixes from systematic code + UX review

item.title: Version 0.5.13
item.description:
• use ⌘+ instead of ⌘= for Increase Text Size shortcut
  • gate Connectors behind a Labs feature flag (default off)
  • hide skill chips from chat header to save space
  • prevent duplicate groups from concurrent sync runs
  • show expand/collapse chevron inline next to section title
  • B1 settings redesign + test suite fixes
  • resolve HuggingFace snapshot path for MLX self-test + fix pipe deadlock
  • move hover folder icon to right of section title text
  • show folder.open icon inline on hover for all sidebar section headers
  • tighten sidebar indentation for agent, group, and schedule rows
  • mark Gemma 4 26B and 31B as coming soon in MLX library
  • reduce schedule sidebar indentation
  • project picker + last-project default in schedule editor working dir
  • foldable schedule run rows + auto-fill working dir from agent/group
  • show recent run history inline under each schedule in sidebar
  • add Gemma 4 model presets to app-side fallback list
  • simplify project thread rows and enlarge section header action buttons
  • surface Download/Delete buttons in visible Status column
  • add right-click context menu to MLX library rows
  • add delete option to MLX model picker row
  • simplify sidebar thread rows — remove icon badge and card background
  • add Gemma 4 model presets (E2B, E4B, 26B MoE, 31B)
  • add Color.clear placeholder so onAppear fires before WindowState is set
  • preserve launch intent for no-workdir CLI args, use selectedProjectId for isDefaultProject
  • remove card background from unselected thread rows
  • remove card background from unselected thread rows
  • open MainWindowView directly at launch, no project picker
  • GH Inbox header matches other section header style
  • add no-project WindowState init
  • associate project-repo GH issues with project and use project working dir
  • clean up section headers to match reference design
  • add agent Participant to GH issue conversations so response shows agent name
  • contextual run label in GH inbox row menu (Run Now / Resume / Run Again)
  • prevent duplicate GH inbox entries when UI creation and poller both fire
  • use system message type for GH issue seed so no sender name shows
  • don't auto-select last project on launch to reduce new-user cognitive overload
  • always show project picker on launch instead of auto-opening last project
  • show newly-created GH inbox issues immediately in sidebar
  • hide inspector by default to reduce new-user cognitive overload
  • send GH poller config on fresh sidecar connect and trust all authors when no trusted users set
  • walkthrough tooltip bubbles positioned relative to window origin
  • always show GH Inbox section in sidebar regardless of issue count
  • prevent crash from duplicate group IDs in ActiveSessionObserver.rebuild
  • add modelContext env to GH issue sheet; disable empty Assign & Run; extract ghUnhandledCount
  • add GH Inbox sidebar section with 6 context-menu actions
  • guard active session in ghIssueRunNow; compound predicate in handleGHIssueClosed
  • GitHub Issues bridge + remove create-issue from chat header
  • add ghIssueRunNow and handleGHIssueClosed to AppState
  • add clarify-and-plan skill to coder agent
  • add ghOverrideAgentId to Conversation for GH inbox agent override
  • handle gh.issue.close in sidecar, extract dispatchGHCommand
  • use sourceGroupId for group routing default in Create Issue sheet
  • smart defaults in Create Issue sheet
  • add ghIssueClose command and ghIssueClosed event to wire protocol
  • replace logo.github (macOS 15 only) with exclamationmark.circle
  • make GitHub issue button visible in chat header
  • always show GitHub issue button in chat header
  • gh issue create failing due to missing routing labels + no feedback
  • routing picker in issue sheet, fix daemon uninstall, github icon
  • auto-seed README.md in odyssey-inbox repo
  • add View Issues and Create Issue buttons to GitHub inbox settings
  • correct gh auth status jq path for username lookup
  • use --jq instead of -q for gh auth status username lookup
  • auto-send GH poller config on sidecar connect and settings change
  • move Peers section below Projects in sidebar
  • Nostr peer-to-peer DM routing with multi-peer support
  • Phase 10 — README update for GitHub Issues bridge
  • Phase 9 — unit tests for GHPoller/GHRouter, live test, AppXray spec
  • Phases 7+8 — CreateGHIssueSheet and thread GitHub badge
  • Phases 5+6 — GitHub Settings UI and daemon install script
  • Phase 4 — static import for gh-cli in github-tools
  • Phase 4 — create_github_issue agent tool in PeerBus
  • Phases 2+3 — conversation creation, group routing, poll guard, issue pruning
  • Phases 2+3 — label priority, circular imports, state persistence
  • Phases 2+3 — GHPoller and GHRouter with gh CLI integration
  • Phase 1 — remove dead wire structs and unused parameters
  • Phase 1 — correct CodingKeys repo field name for GH events
  • Phase 1 — SwiftData + wire protocol for GitHub Issue Bridge

item.title: Version 0.5.12
item.description:
• explicit WD context for all chat entry points + Chat built-in agent
  • correct CONFIG_DIR and whats-new path in odyssey-control MCP
  • add scheduling capabilities to Ulysses via odyssey-control MCP
  • add Ulysses sample prompts — list agents, create agent, open chat, what's new
  • correct team ID, activate app before TCC dialogs, default voice off
  • wire odyssey-control as stdio MCP subprocess so tools appear in Claude
  • add odyssey-control MCP — structured app control for Ulysses
  • remove extra indentation from project thread rows inside DisclosureGroup
  • replace Active/History buckets with flat thread list + auto-shown Archived section
  • use DisclosureGroup for project rows to align chevron with agents/groups
  • move project chevron outside card to align with agents/groups
  • add left-side fold/unfold chevron to project rows in sidebar
  • match project icon badge size to agent/group style in sidebar
  • inject ODYSSEY_INSTANCE env var into sidecar so each instance identifies correctly
  • show instance name in window title for non-default Odyssey instances
  • pass instanceName to SidecarManager.Config so Keychain keys are correct for non-default instances
  • lock auto-named instances and move _lockFd above name
  • lock-based auto-naming for parallel Odyssey instances
  • remove AVCaptureDevice.requestAccess — mic TCC fires via AVAudioEngine
  • remove proactive permission request from onAppear (was crashing)
  • add Ulysses — resident app companion and config manager
  • request voice permissions on chat open + Open Settings button
  • replace onLongPressGesture with NSView mouseDown/mouseUp for mic hold
  • mic button gesture not firing on macOS — remove Button wrapper
  • auto-generate release notes in release.sh — shown in Sparkle update dialog and GitHub releases
  • crash in requestPermissions — nonisolated continuations for Swift 6
  • sidebar shows only pinned/active agents and groups
  • resolve voice crash and hold-gesture not working on macOS
  • add Lean Startup group with CEO-led executive team
  • add master Voice Features toggle to settings and chat
  • cast speaking rate via NSNumber to handle Double/Float AppStorage mismatch
  • add voice settings section (voice picker, auto-speak, rate, speaker button)
  • add VoiceModeOverlay and wire auto-send in ChatView
  • fix TTS stop state staleness and use @Environment in SpeakerButtonRow
  • add TTS speaker button to agent message bubbles
  • animate WaveformBarsView using TimelineView phase sweep
  • add STT mic button and waveform to chat input
  • add voice services and isVoiceModeActive to AppState
  • guard TTS delegate against stale cancel callback
  • add TextToSpeechService for TTS via AVSpeechSynthesizer
  • add VoiceInputService for STT via SFSpeechRecognizer
  • add microphone/speech permissions and Speech framework

item.title: Version 0.5.11
item.description:
• Sidebar now shows only pinned and active agents/groups — cleaner, less noise
  • New built-in group: Lean Startup with CEO, PM, Designer, and Engineer agents

item.title: Version 0.5.10
item.description:
• Performance: Eliminated main-thread stalls from SwiftData, debounced conversation index, isolated streaming observation, and batched saves
  • Fixed MarkdownContent rendering empty during view recycling
  • Sidecar GenerationService with REST endpoints for agent/group/template generation
  • Fixed template action button icons

item.title: Version 0.5.9
item.description:
• Project Templates: Project-scoped prompt templates with one-click auto-send from sidebar
  • Agent Model Picker: Choose Sonnet, Opus, Haiku, or Ollama per agent
  • Config Management: Delete and duplicate agents, skills, and MCPs with confirmation
  • Pin groups to sidebar for quick access
  • Global project templates auto-seeded across all projects

item.title: Version 0.5.8
item.description:
• Nostr invite flow refactored — cleaner wire types, updated pairing views, iOS bridge
  • Fixed launch crash caused by CloudKit entitlement stripped during Developer ID signing

item.title: Version 0.5.7
item.description: • ⚠️ This release had a launch crash and was superseded by v0.5.8

item.title: Version 0.5.6
item.description:
• Inline browser in chat with Safari and panel expand options
  • iOS Nostr relay bridge with integration tests
  • Fixed inline browser toolbar button visibility
